case_title: SWINSON, CALVIN R. VS CATHEDRAL HILL VISTA HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-08-2003, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAY-13-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-05-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-03-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES TO REVIEW (1) PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS FROM PLFTS TO DEFT. (2) STATUS OF ROOF REPAIR ON PLFT'S UNIT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWINSON, CALVIN R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL VISTA HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,035.00, CHANDLER PROPERTIES DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE 01/07/03. CLAIM REDUCE TO $2000 PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-03-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-07-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PER PARTIES' REQUEST.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-07-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PER PLFT'S REQUEST. DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT. CHANDLER PROPERTIES & CONTINUED TO 4/8/03 @ 10 AM. POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SWINSON, CALVIN R. AS TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL VISTA HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION CHANDLER PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAILING TO CHANDLER PROPERTIES RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT PAPAERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES
